list.name: Fundamentals of Accelerated Computing with CUDA C/C++

responsibilities: Integrate Django Allauth to enable OAuth capabilities on the existing user login flow and database
Complete version upgrade for the backend API documentation, ensuring accuracy and compliance with new API endpoints

lineChatbot.name: Line Chatbot for Long-Term Care Facilities
lineChatbot.subtitle: Engineering Design and Implementation for Sustainable Development, National Taiwan University
description: Collaborate on the full-stack development of a serverless Line chatbot for long-term care facilities.
Reduce communication costs and increase transparency for residents' family members
Integrated the Line Login feature for secure user authentication and deployed the entire application on Vercel

brailleDisplay.name: Refreshable Braille Display
brailleDisplay.subtitle: Practical Digital Electronics, National Taiwan University
description: Collaborate to create a refreshable braille display, serving as a proof-of-concept for a portable dynamic tactile map
Aim to improve navigation for people with visual disabilities, addressing critical limitations of existing technologies

speechSummarization.name: AI-powered Realtime Speech Summarization
speechSummarization.subtitle: Microsoft Engage – Training Program for University Students with Disabilities
description: Collaborate to develop an AI-powered realtime speech summarization software in less than one month
OpenAI Whisper for speech-to-text conversion, Google Gemini for summarization, and Streamlit for the prototype

dsa.name: Disabled Students' Rights Association, National Taiwan University
responsibilities: Provide community and peer support for students with disabilities
Assist the college in creating a friendly and accessible campus environment for students with disabilities
Actively collaborate with external partners and the NTNU Disability Students' Rights Association to jointly organize the first Youth Disability Rights Empowerment Camp

cyclingClub.name: Cycling Club, National Taiwan University
responsibilities: Manage, repair, and maintain the club's bicycles
Organize riding events and lead members to complete multi-day long rides
